violations.text: Soap and paper towels were not available at the hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of paper towels and hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the dairy reach-in and the front glass reach-in unit. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The door to the outside, located at the store entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2026
The hand-washing sink was lacking paper towels. Paper towels must be available at all times for proper handwashing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025
The hand-washing sink was blocked by buckets of ice melt. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

Per interview, staff failed to sanitize coffee urns and slushie parts after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink. No sanitizer available at the time of inspection. Chlorine from store provided to 3-bay sink for proper sanitizing. Staff training in proper sanitizing is required. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the front reach-in and the dairy reach-in units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips must be obtained and used to be sure proper concentration of chlorine is being used to sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
